plugins.name: agent-cowork
plugins.description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering three areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support, resolves paths/URLs from .gitmodules with no separate config file); (3) agent context handoff brief generation — handoff (ephemeral brief Markdown for cross-agent or cross-teammate task transfer).

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack), my-backend-architecture (Progressive-Disclosure knowledge skill for a personal FSD-inspired backend architecture with NestJS-centric examples; covers layer dependency rules, slice boundaries, ORM strategies for TypeORM/Drizzle/Prisma, DIP patterns, and static module-boundary enforcement tooling).

plugins.name: ddd-workshop
plugins.description: DDD pipeline with two paired skills. (1) domain-classroom — teaches general industry patterns of an unfamiliar domain in lecture mode, grounded in cognitive-science 8 principles. Menu-driven priority bundles → phase deep-dive → 3 baseline Q&A with skip/continue. Laws and standards integrated as study material. AI judges if input materials are needed. Output: docs/learning-notes/{domain}-classroom.md. (2) bigpicture — 1:1 analytic tool for Big Picture EventStorming. Maps general patterns from domain-classroom + client materials into the canonical Big Picture artifact (time-ordered events, phases, actors, external systems, hotspots, pivots). No personas, no narrative — phase-by-phase analytic accumulation. Domain-event 4-criteria gate prevents UI/telemetry contamination. Korean natural-language + Code Identifier dual notation. Hotspots tagged with ID, where-answered, confidence. Output: docs/eventstorming.md (single file, auto-splits to folder when later stages join). Initial/Update/Cycle modes — repeatable after code is written. UL/BC/Aggregate explicitly excluded as they belong to later stages. Either skill runs standalone or as a pipeline.

plugins.name: fsd-workshop
plugins.description: FSD (Feature-Sliced Design) workshop pipeline — 3 conversational skills for planning FSD architecture from requirements before UI or code is written. requirements-analyzer (1/3: extract pages, routes, user roles; produces fsd-blueprint.md skeleton), structure-planner (2/3: layout zones, shared/ui candidates, widgets candidates, authentication design), framework-adapter (3/3: maps FSD plan to framework-specific folder structure — Next.js, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Angular). Single evolving fsd-blueprint.md refined by each skill.
